scripts.start: concurrently -n DASH,PROF,SERV,SETT,PRIV,HOST -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "npm start --prefix dashboard" "npm start --prefix profile" "npm start --prefix services" "npm start --prefix settings" "npm start --prefix privacy-policy" "wait-on http://localhost:3001 http://localhost:3002 http://localhost:3003 http://localhost:3004 http://localhost:3005 && npm start --prefix host"
